---
title: "07_make-si-tables-r1"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# Setup

```{r}
#| warning: false
#| message: false
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(tidyr)
```

```{r}
wd_outputs <- "/Volumes/rdm04/DEBIAS/data/outputs"
dict_path <- "/Volumes/rdm04/DEBIAS/data/inputs/census/census2021-ts/dictionary.csv"
repo_root <- "/Users/carmen/Documents/github/de-bias/bias-detection"
out_dir <- file.path(repo_root, "outputs/preliminary/si-tables-r1-ml-robustness")
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

dataset_paths <- tibble::tribble(
  ~dataset_label, ~dataset_key, ~base_case_dir, ~explain_bias_dir,
  "Twitter/X", "twitter", file.path(wd_outputs, "twitter/monthly/populations/active-population-bias/base-case"), file.path(repo_root, "outputs/preliminary/twitter/explain-bias"),
  "Meta", "meta", file.path(wd_outputs, "fb/census-month/populations/tts/active-population-bias/base-case"), file.path(repo_root, "outputs/preliminary/fb_tts/explain-bias"),
  "Multi-app1", "mapp1", file.path(wd_outputs, "mapp1/census-month/populations/active-population-bias/base-case"), file.path(repo_root, "outputs/preliminary/mapp1/explain-bias"),
  "Multi-app2", "mapp2", file.path(wd_outputs, "mapp2/census-month/populations/active-population-bias/base-case"), file.path(repo_root, "outputs/preliminary/mapp2/explain-bias")
)
```

# Helpers

```{r}
pick_latest <- function(path_dir, pattern) {
  files <- list.files(path_dir, pattern = pattern, full.names = TRUE)
  if (length(files) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  files[which.max(file.info(files)$mtime)]
}

read_or_empty <- function(path_file) {
  if (is.na(path_file) || !file.exists(path_file)) return(data.frame())
  readr::read_csv(path_file, show_col_types = FALSE) %>% as.data.frame()
}

build_dict_df <- function(path_file) {
  df <- read_or_empty(path_file)
  if (!is.data.frame(df) || nrow(df) == 0) {
    return(tibble::tibble(variable = character(), variable_label = character()))
  }
  if (all(c("var_label5", "var_label2") %in% names(df))) {
    return(
      df %>%
        as_tibble() %>%
        transmute(variable = var_label5, variable_label = var_label2) %>%
        distinct(variable, .keep_all = TRUE)
    )
  }
  if (all(c("var_label0", "var_label2") %in% names(df))) {
    return(
      df %>%
        as_tibble() %>%
        transmute(variable = var_label0, variable_label = var_label2) %>%
        distinct(variable, .keep_all = TRUE)
    )
  }
  tibble::tibble(variable = character(), variable_label = character())
}

round_numeric <- function(df, digits = 2) {
  df %>% mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(., digits)))
}

sig_stars <- function(p) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    is.na(p) ~ "",
    p < 0.01 ~ "***",
    p < 0.05 ~ "**",
    p < 0.10 ~ "*",
    TRUE ~ ""
  )
}

extract_first <- function(df, colname) {
  if (!is.data.frame(df) || nrow(df) == 0 || !(colname %in% names(df))) return(NA_real_)
  as.numeric(df[[colname]][1])
}

to_pretty_base <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    rename(
      `Data Source` = data_source,
      `Alpha Hat` = alpha_hat,
      `Predicted Bias` = predicted_bias,
      `R Squared` = r_squared,
      `RMSE` = rmse,
      `Moran's I (Residuals)` = moran_i_residuals,
      `P Value (Residuals)` = p_value_residuals
    )
}

to_pretty_corr <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    select(any_of(c(
      "variable_label", "n",
      "pearson_r", "pearson_p", "spearman_rho", "spearman_p",
      "distance_correlation",
      "lm_aic", "lm_bic", "gam_aic", "gam_bic"
    ))) %>%
    mutate(
      pearson_r = paste0(sprintf("%.2f", pearson_r), sig_stars(pearson_p)),
      spearman_rho = paste0(sprintf("%.2f", spearman_rho), sig_stars(spearman_p)),
      distance_correlation = sprintf("%.2f", distance_correlation)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      `Covariate` = variable_label,
      `N` = n,
      `Pearson r` = pearson_r,
      `Spearman rho` = spearman_rho,
      `Distance Correlation` = distance_correlation,
      `Linear AIC` = lm_aic,
      `Linear BIC` = lm_bic,
      `GAM AIC` = gam_aic,
      `GAM BIC` = gam_bic
    ) %>%
    select(-any_of(c("pearson_p", "spearman_p")))
}

to_pretty_cov_moran <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    select(any_of(c("variable_label", "variable", "moran_i_queen", "p_value_queen", "n_used"))) %>%
    mutate(
      variable_label = ifelse(is.na(variable_label) | variable_label == "", variable, variable_label),
      `Moran's I (Queen)` = sprintf("%.2f", moran_i_queen),
      `P Value (Queen)` = paste0(sprintf("%.2f", p_value_queen), sig_stars(p_value_queen))
    ) %>%
    rename(
      `Covariate` = variable_label,
      `N Used` = n_used
    ) %>%
    select(`Covariate`, `Moran's I (Queen)`, `P Value (Queen)`, `N Used`)
}

read_ml_perf_table <- function(base_dir, dataset_label, validation, lagged_covariates, perf_file, moran_file, value_col) {
  perf_path <- file.path(base_dir, perf_file)
  moran_path <- file.path(base_dir, moran_file)
  
  perf_df <- read_or_empty(perf_path)
  moran_df <- read_or_empty(moran_path)
  
  if (!is.data.frame(perf_df) || nrow(perf_df) == 0) {
    return(tibble())
  }
  
  perf_long <- perf_df %>%
    as_tibble() %>%
    select(metric, value = all_of(value_col)) %>%
    mutate(
      dataset = dataset_label,
      validation = validation,
      lagged_covariates = lagged_covariates
    )
  
  perf_wide <- perf_long %>%
    tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = metric, values_from = value)
  
  perf_wide %>%
    mutate(
      moran_i_residuals = extract_first(moran_df, "moran_i_residuals"),
      p_value_residuals = extract_first(moran_df, "p_value_residuals")
    )
}

read_ml_hyper_table <- function(base_dir, dataset_label, validation, lagged_covariates, param_file) {
  param_path <- file.path(base_dir, param_file)
  param_df <- read_or_empty(param_path)
  
  if (!is.data.frame(param_df) || nrow(param_df) == 0) {
    return(tibble())
  }
  
  param_df %>%
    as_tibble() %>%
    mutate(
      dataset = dataset_label,
      model_specification = dplyr::case_when(
        validation == "Holdout" & !lagged_covariates ~ "Holdout",
        validation == "Holdout" & lagged_covariates ~ "Holdout (lagged cov.)",
        validation == "Spatial block CV" & !lagged_covariates ~ "Spatial CV",
        validation == "Spatial block CV" & lagged_covariates ~ "Spatial CV (lagged cov.)",
        TRUE ~ validation
      )
    ) %>%
    select(
      dataset,
      model_specification,
      any_of(c(
        "eta", "max_depth", "min_child_weight", "subsample",
        "colsample_bytree", "lambda", "alpha", "optimal_trees", "min_RMSE"
      ))
    )
}

to_pretty_ml_perf <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(
      `Lagged Covariates` = dplyr::if_else(as.character(lagged_covariates) == "TRUE", "Yes", "No"),
      `Residual Moran p-value` = paste0(sprintf("%.2f", p_value_residuals), sig_stars(p_value_residuals))
    ) %>%
    transmute(
      Dataset = dataset,
      Validation = validation,
      `Lagged Covariates` = `Lagged Covariates`,
      RMSE = sprintf("%.3f", rmse),
      Pearson = sprintf("%.3f", pearson),
      Spearman = sprintf("%.3f", spearman),
      `SD Error` = sprintf("%.3f", standard_dev),
      `Residual Moran's I` = sprintf("%.3f", moran_i_residuals),
      `Residual Moran p-value` = `Residual Moran p-value`
    )
}

to_pretty_ml_hyper <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    transmute(
      Dataset = dataset,
      `Model Specification` = model_specification,
      eta = sprintf("%.2f", eta),
      `Max Depth` = max_depth,
      `Min Child Weight` = min_child_weight,
      Subsample = sprintf("%.2f", subsample),
      `Column Subsampling` = sprintf("%.2f", colsample_bytree),
      `L2 Penalty` = sprintf("%.2f", lambda),
      `L1 Penalty` = sprintf("%.2f", alpha),
      `Optimal Trees` = optimal_trees,
      `Min RMSE` = sprintf("%.3f", min_RMSE)
    )
}
```

# Build Table S1: baseline summary

```{r}
summary_rows <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(dataset_paths)), function(i) {
  ds_label <- dataset_paths$dataset_label[i]
  ds_dir <- dataset_paths$base_case_dir[i]
  
  metrics_file <- pick_latest(ds_dir, "^base_case_metrics.*\\.csv$")
  moran_file <- pick_latest(ds_dir, "^base_case_residual_moran.*\\.csv$")
  
  metrics_df <- read_or_empty(metrics_file)
  moran_df <- read_or_empty(moran_file)
  
  data.frame(
    data_source = ds_label,
    alpha_hat = extract_first(metrics_df, "alpha_hat"),
    predicted_bias = extract_first(metrics_df, "predicted_bias"),
    r_squared = extract_first(metrics_df, "r_squared"),
    rmse = extract_first(metrics_df, "rmse"),
    moran_i_residuals = extract_first(moran_df, "moran_i_residuals"),
    p_value_residuals = extract_first(moran_df, "p_value_residuals")
  )
})

base_summary <- bind_rows(summary_rows) %>% round_numeric()
base_summary <- base_summary %>% to_pretty_base()
readr::write_csv(base_summary, file.path(out_dir, "table_basecase_summary.csv"))

base_summary
```

# Build Table S2+: per-dataset covariate tables

```{r}
corr_tables <- list()
dict_df <- build_dict_df(dict_path)

for (i in seq_len(nrow(dataset_paths))) {
  corr_file <- pick_latest(dataset_paths$base_case_dir[i], "^base_case_residual_pairwise_correlations.*\\.csv$")
  corr_df <- read_or_empty(corr_file)
  
  if (!is.data.frame(corr_df) || nrow(corr_df) == 0) {
    message("No pairwise table found for: ", dataset_paths$dataset_label[i])
    next
  }
  
  corr_df <- corr_df %>%
    as_tibble() %>%
    left_join(dict_df, by = "variable") %>%
    mutate(variable_label = ifelse(is.na(variable_label) | variable_label == "", variable, variable_label)) %>%
    arrange(gam_aic) %>%
    round_numeric() %>%
    to_pretty_corr()
  
  out_csv <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("table_residual_covariates_", dataset_paths$dataset_key[i], ".csv"))
  readr::write_csv(corr_df, out_csv)
  corr_tables[[dataset_paths$dataset_label[i]]] <- corr_df
}

names(corr_tables)
```

# Build Table S+: covariate Moran's I table (Queen)

```{r}
# Covariate Moran's I is dataset-invariant in practice (same geography/covariates),
# so we keep one SI table to avoid redundant duplicates.
moran_cov_candidates <- unlist(lapply(dataset_paths$explain_bias_dir, pick_latest, pattern = "^covariate-moran-queen.*\\.csv$"))
moran_cov_candidates <- moran_cov_candidates[!is.na(moran_cov_candidates)]

if (length(moran_cov_candidates) == 0) {
  cov_moran_table <- data.frame()
  message("No covariate Moran table found in explain-bias output directories.")
} else {
  moran_cov_file <- moran_cov_candidates[which.max(file.info(moran_cov_candidates)$mtime)]
  cov_moran_table <- read_or_empty(moran_cov_file) %>%
    as_tibble() %>%
    arrange(desc(abs(moran_i_queen))) %>%
    to_pretty_cov_moran()
  
  readr::write_csv(cov_moran_table, file.path(out_dir, "table_covariate_moran_queen.csv"))
}

cov_moran_table
```

# Build Table S+: ML performance robustness across validation schemes

```{r}
ml_specs <- tibble::tribble(
  ~validation, ~lagged_covariates, ~perf_file, ~moran_file, ~value_col, ~param_file,
  "Holdout", FALSE, "model-performance_lad_holdout_nolagcov.csv", "model-residual-moran_lad_holdout_nolagcov.csv", "test", "optimal_parameters_lad_holdout_nolagcov.csv",
  "Holdout", TRUE,  "model-performance_lad_holdout_lagcov.csv",   "model-residual-moran_lad_holdout_lagcov.csv",   "test", "optimal_parameters_lad_holdout_lagcov.csv",
  "Spatial block CV", FALSE, "model-performance_lad_spatialcv_nolagcov.csv", "model-residual-moran_lad_spatialcv_nolagcov.csv", "blocked_cv_mean", "optimal_parameters_lad_spatialcv_nolagcov.csv",
  "Spatial block CV", TRUE,  "model-performance_lad_spatialcv_lagcov.csv",   "model-residual-moran_lad_spatialcv_lagcov.csv",   "blocked_cv_mean", "optimal_parameters_lad_spatialcv_lagcov.csv"
)

ml_perf_rows <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(dataset_paths)), function(i) {
  ds_label <- dataset_paths$dataset_label[i]
  ds_dir <- dataset_paths$explain_bias_dir[i]
  
  bind_rows(lapply(seq_len(nrow(ml_specs)), function(j) {
    read_ml_perf_table(
      base_dir = ds_dir,
      dataset_label = ds_label,
      validation = ml_specs$validation[j],
      lagged_covariates = ml_specs$lagged_covariates[j],
      perf_file = ml_specs$perf_file[j],
      moran_file = ml_specs$moran_file[j],
      value_col = ml_specs$value_col[j]
    )
  }))
})

ml_perf_table <- bind_rows(ml_perf_rows) %>%
  mutate(
    validation = factor(validation, levels = c("Holdout", "Spatial block CV")),
    lagged_covariates = factor(lagged_covariates, levels = c(FALSE, TRUE))
  ) %>%
  arrange(dataset, validation, lagged_covariates) %>%
  to_pretty_ml_perf()

readr::write_csv(ml_perf_table, file.path(out_dir, "table_ml_performance_robustness.csv"))

ml_perf_table
```

# Build Table S+: ML hyperparameter robustness across validation schemes

```{r}
ml_hyper_rows <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(dataset_paths)), function(i) {
  ds_label <- dataset_paths$dataset_label[i]
  ds_dir <- dataset_paths$explain_bias_dir[i]
  
  bind_rows(lapply(seq_len(nrow(ml_specs)), function(j) {
    read_ml_hyper_table(
      base_dir = ds_dir,
      dataset_label = ds_label,
      validation = ml_specs$validation[j],
      lagged_covariates = ml_specs$lagged_covariates[j],
      param_file = ml_specs$param_file[j]
    )
  }))
})

ml_hyper_table <- bind_rows(ml_hyper_rows) %>%
  mutate(
    dataset = factor(dataset, levels = dataset_paths$dataset_label),
    model_specification = factor(
      model_specification,
      levels = c("Holdout", "Holdout (lagged cov.)", "Spatial CV", "Spatial CV (lagged cov.)")
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(dataset, model_specification) %>%
  to_pretty_ml_hyper()

readr::write_csv(ml_hyper_table, file.path(out_dir, "table_ml_hyperparameters_robustness.csv"))

ml_hyper_table
```

# Optional: build formatted Word document

```{r}
has_officer <- requireNamespace("officer", quietly = TRUE)
has_flextable <- requireNamespace("flextable", quietly = TRUE)

if (has_officer && has_flextable) {
  library(officer)
  library(flextable)
  
  make_ft <- function(df) {
    flextable(df) %>%
      theme_booktabs() %>%
      bold(part = "header") %>%
      fontsize(size = 10, part = "all") %>%
      autofit()
  }
  
  doc <- read_docx()
  doc <- doc %>%
    body_add_par("Supplementary Tables (R1 Revision)", style = "heading 1") %>%
    body_add_par("Table S1. Proportional baseline summary by data source.", style = "heading 2") %>%
    body_add_flextable(make_ft(base_summary))
  
  for (nm in names(corr_tables)) {
    doc <- doc %>%
      body_add_par(paste0("Table S: ", nm, " residual-covariate assessments (ordered by GAM AIC)."), style = "heading 2") %>%
      body_add_flextable(make_ft(corr_tables[[nm]]))
  }
  
  if (is.data.frame(cov_moran_table) && nrow(cov_moran_table) > 0) {
    doc <- doc %>%
      body_add_par("Table S: Moran's I (Queen) for model covariates.", style = "heading 2") %>%
      body_add_flextable(make_ft(cov_moran_table))
  }
  
  if (is.data.frame(ml_perf_table) && nrow(ml_perf_table) > 0) {
    doc <- doc %>%
      body_add_par("Table S: Performance of the four machine-learning specifications by dataset.", style = "heading 2") %>%
      body_add_flextable(make_ft(ml_perf_table))
  }
  
  if (is.data.frame(ml_hyper_table) && nrow(ml_hyper_table) > 0) {
    doc <- doc %>%
      body_add_par("Table S: Selected XGBoost hyperparameters for the four machine-learning specifications by dataset.", style = "heading 2") %>%
      body_add_flextable(make_ft(ml_hyper_table))
  }
  
  out_docx <- file.path(out_dir, "si_tables_r1.docx")
  print(doc, target = out_docx)
  out_docx
} else {
  message("Skipping Word export. Install `officer` and `flextable` to create si_tables_r1.docx.")
}
```

# Output directory

```{r}
out_dir
list.files(out_dir)
```
